programme.title: Air Jaws: Hunt For Colossus
programme.desc: A 20-foot great white breaches in New Zealand, launching a hunt for Colossus - the legendary shark that may lead to a hidden colony of great whites.

programme.title: Black Mako Of The Abyss
programme.desc: Marine biologist Craig O'Connell leads a team to investigate a shark, which displays traits of both great whites and makos. They uncover astonishing evidence that challenges existing knowledge about sharks.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive
programme.sub-title: Ivory Billed Woodpecker Of The Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists in the alligator and snake infested swamps of Louisiana.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Get the inside scoop on their recent trips to Indonesia and Australia, and find out how the cast handles hoaxers.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: The boys venture to a remote area controlled by the Dayak people of Borneo. While there, they are prepared to risk it all in order to catch the majestic and mighty mahseer fish.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde race against the clock to build Rapper and actor Ludacris a classy tank. He wants a sophisticated aquarium, complete with lots of exotic fish.

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: Washington's Fish and Wildlife Police search for stranded cougar cubs. In the Seattle harbour, an unsuspecting rock fish poacher is arrested.

programme.title: Black Mako Of The Abyss
programme.desc: Marine biologist Craig O'Connell leads a team to investigate a shark, which displays traits of both great whites and makos. They uncover astonishing evidence that challenges existing knowledge about sharks.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive
programme.sub-title: Ivory Billed Woodpecker Of The Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists in the alligator and snake infested swamps of Louisiana.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: Dr. Ross brings his daughter into the clinic. Plus, a dog is rushed in after suffering multiple seizure, and the staff must tame a feisty feline patient.

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: The guys are in Manambato, Madagascar, to track down the tomato frog. One of the world's most remarkable ambush predators, it can dig into the ground in seconds.

programme.title: Bear With Me: Friend Or Foe
programme.desc: Wildlife expert Casey Anderson and his team, including a bear, try to keep the peace between his frightened neighbours and the mountain lions looking through their windows.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Return To The Wilder...
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson and his crew plunge deep on a dangerous journey into the Costa Rican rainforest where they find Central America's most lethal pit viper.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: As the summer fades, the last Alaskans begin their countdown to trapping season. Heimo works to ready a campsite, while Tyler and Ashley hope to stock up on moose meat.

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: While a salmon poacher is arrested in Seattle, a duck hunter with a criminal past is confronted. Plus, a trapped deer is finally freed from a storage compound.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: It's a rough start as the keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates. Then a pair of porcupines arriving at the zoo require delicate handling, and a pregnancy check on a 3,000-pound rhino demands highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to attend their first Puppy Bowl, but which lucky pup will represent the rescue? New parolee Spencer joins Tania on his first mission.

programme.title: Miami Animal Police
programme.desc: In Homestead, a 12 foot albino burmese python is on the loose eating anything in sight. It's eating the local cats and dogs and its next victim could be a small child.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A suspect fleeing on the levee after dark puts wildlife agents in danger.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Get the inside scoop on their recent trips to Indonesia and Australia, and find out how the cast handles hoaxers.

programme.title: Fish Or Die
programme.desc: The boys venture to a remote area controlled by the Dayak people of Borneo. While there, they are prepared to risk it all in order to catch the majestic and mighty mahseer fish.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet
programme.desc: Dr Dee embarks on her first flight as a new pilot to treat animals in the Arctic Circle. She also cares for an aging Border Collie and a disabled Siberian husky.

programme.title: My Pack Life
programme.desc: When Copper the sly and mighty Dachshund mix runs off again, Lee and Sonia embark on yet another mission to find his whereabouts. During their journey, they stumble upon his secret canine cave. Later, Sal the one-ton blind pig gets pampe...

programme.title: My Pack Life
programme.desc: Lee overcomes his history of foster fails by joining forces with Just to surprise his family with Chihuahua mix Minnie. Princess the Alpaca welcomes her new baby and the team dreams up ideas for the sanctuary.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans
programme.desc: The countdown to winter continues as Heimo breaks ground on the new cabin, while Bob and his daughter embark on a river journey to the cabin where she was raised.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tia, Tania and Mariah take a look back at the most adorable moments - from surprising rescues and teary reunions to parolee antics and heart-warming adoptions.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: A suspect fleeing on the levee after dark puts wildlife agents in danger.

programme.title: Miami Animal Police
programme.desc: In Homestead, a 12 foot albino burmese python is on the loose eating anything in sight. It's eating the local cats and dogs and its next victim could be a small child.

programme.desc: In Homestead, a 12 foot albino burmese python is on the loose eating anything in sight. It's eating the local cats and dogs and its next victim could be a small child.

programme.title: Miami Animal Police
programme.desc: Exotic wildlife expert Bob Freer is called to a Homestead restaurant where some strange creatures have been seen running around on the land behind the property.

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: Suspicious shotgun blasts on Catahoula Lake lead wildlife agents on a high-speed chase. A trail of beer cans point to a pair of hunters with multiple violations, and on the bayou, agents catch a lawbreaking crawfisherman.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Follow the crew as Matt, Bobo, Ranae and Cliff investigate a new lead in Florida, for an upcoming episode.

programme.title: Fish Or Die

programme.desc: When a police officer's body camera is hacked and the incendiary video goes viral, the Cyber team is sent to find the truth and the hacker before the small town erupts in unrest.

programme.desc: The Cyber team investigates a child abduction case based on the 'Red Crone,' an online myth where an abductor lures children through an app on their phones.

programme.desc: A hacker takes control of all the networked medical devices at a Dallas hospital - and threatens to kill one patient every hour if his demands are not met. Patricia Arquette stars.

programme.desc: When a man is killed by a driverless car while drag racing with street racer Carmen Lopez, Avery and her team must hunt down the hacker who is cyber-jacking vehicles and using them as remote-controlled cars to cause deadly crashes.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered during a video chat with her parents, Avery's skills are put to the test as she interviews the only other witness, an agoraphobic neighbour with PTSD from the incident.

programme.desc: When Avery's friend, an Interpol agent, is murdered by the #1 criminal on the FBI Cyber's Most Wanted List, Avery risks her life to capture the killer, the Deep Web's most notorious and dangerous drug dealer.

programme.desc: The cyber team investigates the murder of a hacker who was hired to erase an assault victim's comments from a confessional website.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: After an innocent bystander is killed when dozens of ATMs suddenly spew money into the street, the Cyber team investigates the bank heist that is orchestrated by a real-life cyber Robin Hood.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: When the Cyber team investigates what appears to be a hack into air traffic control's communication system, a greater threat emerges when a flight vanishes into thin air, drawing the team into the world's first case of cyber-hijacking.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: When residents of New York City cannot reach the police when calling 911, the Cyber team realizes this is an airborne computer virus that is infecting cell phones and must find the hacker responsible.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: Avery and the Cyber team attempt to work with black hat hacker Stella Kaine, to track down the hacker who took identity theft to a new level and digitally 'killed' Avery's ex-husband.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: When a jogger's body is found, the Cyber team use the fitness tracker she was wearing at the time of the murder to retrace her steps for the entire night leading up to her death.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: Cyber's most notorious criminal, Python, returns to kidnap Avery's surrogate daughter, making the team decipher a series of elaborate code-like puzzles in an attempt to save her life.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The team tracks a vigilante who is taking an extreme reaction to objectionable social media posts by killing off the worst offenders. Patricia Arquette and Ted Danson star.

programme.title: Csi: Cyber
programme.desc: The Cyber team investigates when users of a traffic app are rerouted to remote locations and robbed by masked women. Also, Russell reconnects with Greer Latimore after the team completes business in Los Angeles.

programme.desc: The fate of the U.S. government is at stake as Avery and the Cyber team search for the hacker responsible for the largest breach of highly classified data in history.

programme.title: Words From The City
programme.desc: Explores contemporary Australian hip hop through intimate and candid observations of some of the nations most potent and compelling artists.

programme.desc: The weary crew dodges danger in the desert while trying to figure out where they are. But they unearth more questions than answers.

programme.desc: Jerry is stuck at home when he gets roped into dog-sitting a rambunctious hound. Without Jerry around, George and Elaine find they have little in common.

programme.desc: Jerry gets a call from the library that he has a book that is 25 years overdue. Jerry thinks back to his childhood and remembers that George borrowed it and never gave it back.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After renting a car, Jerry and his friends spend the day shopping at a New Jersey mall. When they decide to head home so George can meet his parents for their 50th wedding anniversary, no one can remember where they parked the car.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry tries to be a very kind man by helping new immigrant Babu Bhatt, who has opened a restaurant across the street. Afraid of being embarrassed, George asks Elaine to take an IQ test for him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: At a 50th anniversary party, Jerry makes a remark that immigrant children shouldn't ride ponies which offends the guest of honor. When she dies, Jerry has to decide whether to go to a championship softball game or attend her funeral.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping with Elaine, Jerry buys an expensive suede jacket. Elaine convinces George and Jerry to meet her father, who has a reputation of being difficult and intimidating.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George, thinking his girlfriend is ignoring him, leaves nasty messages on her answering machine. But George finds out that she's actually out of town and enlists Jerry's help to switch answering machine tapes.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine talks Jerry into hiring a friend who's working his way through college by cleaning people's homes. When a statue is discovered missing, he suspects the student.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George seeks revenge on his boss after he quits and then tries to get his job back. Jerry and Kramer think a laundromat owner stole money from Jerry.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry tries to decipher an unintelligible note he wrote in the middle of the night. George visits a holistic healer to deal with a medical issue.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine believe that they have found a foolproof way to start having sex again yet still remain just friends, but they quickly start encountering problems.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer convinces Jerry to get illegal cable. Elaine holds a baby shower for a former girlfriend of George, who he wants revenge against for a callous incident.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry, Elaine and George stop for a quick Chinese meal before seeing Plan 9 From Outer Space, but George needs the payphone he can't have, Jerry needs the name he can't recall, and Elaine needs food.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George accidentally gets a busboy fired. Feeling bad, he tries to make up for the incident but ends up losing the busboy's cat in the process. Meanwhile, Elaine has a houseguest that won't leave.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine come up with signals so they can help one another get out of bad situations at a party. At the party, George strands Jerry and Elaine at the party when he leaves with a woman, forcing them to call Kramer for a ride.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry scares a massage therapist, while George questions his sexuality after a massage. Kramer insists he saw Joe DiMaggio at a donut shop.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After a tortuous evening with a new girlfriend, George tells her they should stop seeing each other. He then makes the mistake of accommodating her when she insists on hearing the reason.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Hoping they can do some scuba diving, Jerry takes Elaine to Florida where he is appearing at a banquet honouring his father's retirement as president of his condominium association.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry is stuck at home when he gets roped into dog-sitting a rambunctious hound. Without Jerry around, George and Elaine find they have little in common.

programme.desc: Jerry gets a call from the library that he has a book that is 25 years overdue. Jerry thinks back to his childhood and remembers that George borrowed it and never gave it back.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine believe that they have found a foolproof way to start having sex again yet still remain just friends, but they quickly start encountering problems.

programme.desc: Elaine anonymously records a racy voiceover for Jerry as a joke, causing George to become attracted to her. George orders baldness cream from China.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's girlfriend gets plastic surgery. Jerry dates a woman he finds sexy but dislikes spending time with. Kramer wants a very specific jacket.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's car is stolen and has trouble getting a rental car but is able to contact the thief by calling his carphone. George gets a job moving cars which slows the normal traffic flow and Elaine tries to break up with her 66 year-old boyf...

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and company are embroiled in a fierce legal battle when they are prosecuted under the Good Samaritan Law, failing to help a pedestrian that was mugged; the new president of NBC calls a meeting with George and Jerry.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Everyone has an uncommon experience on the subway: Jerry befriends a naked guy, George gets picked up by a stunner, Kramer is tipped to a hot horse, and Elaine gets stuck en route to a wedding.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A Pez dispenser causes George's girlfriend to flub a piano recital. Kramer creates a cologne that smells like the beach. Jerry hosts an intervention.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After a suicide attempt by Jerry's neighbour lands him in a coma, Jerry begins a relationship with his hot girlfriend. George visits a psychic who predicts trouble on his upcoming trip to the Caymans.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Against their better judgment, Jerry and Elaine decide to play matchmaker for the jobless, dateless and possibly hopeless George, setting him up with a single friend of Elaine's.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry meets Keith Hernandez and wants to make a good impression, but after being introduced to Elaine, Keith breaks his date with Jerry to make one with her; George runs out of time on his unemployment and attempts to stall.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry becomes increasingly jealous of Elaine's relationship with Keith Hernandez. The unemployed George Constanza schemes to collect unemployment checks, while the illustrated JFK "second spitter theory" is further investigated.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Jerry take a limo that was supposed to be for a passenger who never made it on the plane and invite Elaine and Kramer to join them.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Jerry confronts a woman that he saw hit-and-run, he ends up dating her, causing the victim to think Jerry did it. Meanwhile, George sleeps with Elaine's friend and Kramer has bad reactions to Marty Hart's voice.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's new girlfriend gives his friends Elaine, George and Kramer prime VIP seats to a Yankees baseball game. But when the trio is tossed out for a minor altercation, Jerry backs up his friends and calls it quits with the woman.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George damages Jerry's car driving over a pothole, then argues with Kramer's friend about a parking space outside Jerry's place, while Elaine comes up with a wild story about how the accident happened.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry is fed up with Kramer coming into his apartment any time he feels like it and asks him to return his spare set of keys, forcing Kramer to hit the road to California to pursue an acting career.

programme.desc: George uses Susan's death to pick up hot women. Jerry's latest girlfriend has 'man hands', while Elaine's new beau is Jerry's exact opposite. Kramer stumbles into a white-collar job at a big firm.

programme.desc: A bookstore busts Uncle Leo for shoplifting and George for bathroom reading; a misdeed at a company party costs Elaine; Kramer and Newman get a rickshaw, and audition homeless people to pull it.

programme.desc: When singer Bette Midler is accidentally injured in their softball game, Jerry and George are accused of conspiring to get her understudy in a new musical the starring role.

programme.desc: Kramer's moneymaking scheme to sell vintage raincoats designed by Jerry's dad backfires when Morty has to depend on his Florida neighbor, Jack Klompus, to get the goods to New York.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George goes to work for his father; Jerry's girlfriend wants to see his emotions; Kramer adopts a suburban feel at home; Elaine prompts two Jewish men to renounce their faith.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A bad odour left by a valet in Jerry's car seeps into the love life of Elaine. George discovers that his ex-girlfriend Susan has become a lesbian, but her new partner now has her eye on Kramer.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A new soup restaurant opens with soup that everyone loves. But the owner, dubbed 'the Soup Nazi', is eccentric and wants everyone to follow a strict ordering procedure.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine come up with signals so they can help one another get out of bad situations at a party. At the party, George strands Jerry and Elaine at the party when he leaves with a woman, forcing them to call Kramer for a ride.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George, Elaine and Jerry attend Dr Tim Whatley's Hanukkah party where each receive a card notifying him or her that a donation has been made by Whatley to the Children's Alliance in the guest's name.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Kramer hides the keys to his new strong box in Jerry's apartment, George and Elaine each look for ways out of their respective romantic relationships.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After a suicide attempt by Jerry's neighbour lands him in a coma, Jerry begins a relationship with his hot girlfriend. George visits a psychic who predicts trouble on his upcoming trip to the Caymans.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry risks losing a girlfriend over a joke, George continues to work despite having been asked to leave; Elaine finds breaking up is hard to do as Kramer hires an assistant.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's new flame keeps including "yada yada" in her stories. Jerry is offended by Whatley's Jewish jokes. Elaine tries to help Beth and her new husband adopt a baby. Kramer and Mickey double date.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer prepares for his millennium party, Jerry jockeys for position on his girlfriend's speed dial, Elaine gets irked by an inattentive saleswoman, and George tries to get sacked by The Yankees.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Good Samaritans Jerry, George and Elaine volunteer to comfort and assist senior citizens in their homes.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A prank by Elaine leads a newspaper journalist to think that Jerry and George are gay. Not that there's anything wrong with that.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After renting a car, Jerry and his friends spend the day shopping at a New Jersey mall. When they decide to head home so George can meet his parents for their 50th wedding anniversary, no one can remember where they parked the car.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Hoping they can do some scuba diving, Jerry takes Elaine to Florida where he is appearing at a banquet honouring his father's retirement as president of his condominium association.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A Pez dispenser causes George's girlfriend to flub a piano recital. Kramer creates a cologne that smells like the beach. Jerry hosts an intervention.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After a suicide attempt by Jerry's neighbour lands him in a coma, Jerry begins a relationship with his hot girlfriend. George visits a psychic who predicts trouble on his upcoming trip to the Caymans.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Against their better judgment, Jerry and Elaine decide to play matchmaker for the jobless, dateless and possibly hopeless George, setting him up with a single friend of Elaine's.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry meets Keith Hernandez and wants to make a good impression, but after being introduced to Elaine, Keith breaks his date with Jerry to make one with her; George runs out of time on his unemployment and attempts to stall.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry becomes increasingly jealous of Elaine's relationship with Keith Hernandez. The unemployed George Constanza schemes to collect unemployment checks, while the illustrated JFK "second spitter theory" is further investigated.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Jerry take a limo that was supposed to be for a passenger who never made it on the plane and invite Elaine and Kramer to join them.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Jerry confronts a woman that he saw hit-and-run, he ends up dating her, causing the victim to think Jerry did it. Meanwhile, George sleeps with Elaine's friend and Kramer has bad reactions to Marty Hart's voice.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's new girlfriend gives his friends Elaine, George and Kramer prime VIP seats to a Yankees baseball game. But when the trio is tossed out for a minor altercation, Jerry backs up his friends and calls it quits with the woman.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George damages Jerry's car driving over a pothole, then argues with Kramer's friend about a parking space outside Jerry's place, while Elaine comes up with a wild story about how the accident happened.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry is fed up with Kramer coming into his apartment any time he feels like it and asks him to return his spare set of keys, forcing Kramer to hit the road to California to pursue an acting career.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Jerry go to LA for Jerry to appear on the Tonight Show. Kramer struggles to land acting roles. George annoys George Wendt and Corbin Bernsen.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While searching for Kramer in Los Angeles, Jerry and George are picked up for questioning by the police, who suspect Kramer is a notorious serial killer known as the smog stranger.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC executives ask Jerry to come up with an idea for a TV series. George decides he can be a sitcom writer and comes up with "nothing." Kramer trades a radar detector for a helmet, and later Newman receives a speeding ticket.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC gives Jerry and George another meeting and on the way, Jerry throws out a watch his parents gave him. Also, Kramer suffers side effects from head injury.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Morty, Jerry's father, comes to New York to see a back specialist and asks Jerry about the watch he gave him. At NBC, George tries negotiate their deal, but ends up doing more bad than good.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry has dinner with his parents and Uncle Leo. Elaine uses Kramer as her boyfriend in trying to fool her shrink and Jerry tries to buy back the watch.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine, Jerry, George and Susan go to a cabin owned by Susan's father. They all take a side trip with Jerry to visit a sick fan who is a "bubble boy" in order to avoid germs.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry says the wrong thing while starting to get intimate with one of Elaine's co-workers; Henry's incriminating letters are found in the cabin debris; Jerry and George start working on the pilot for the series they pitched to NBC.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer gets everyone tickets to the opera. But George scalps his tickets after Susan can't go. Elaine breaks up with "Crazy" Joe, and Jerry and Elaine go to the opera together, each not knowing the other's past with "Crazy" Joe.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Jerry continue working on their script and try to find a good idea to base the series off of. George considers dumping Susan so he can use his new profession to attract women.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George is caught by his mother, the four main characters devise a contest to see who can go the longest without pleasuring him/herself.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Jerry and Elaine are forced to take a standby flight, Jerry gets to party in first class with a model; George and Kramer go between JFK and La Guardia to pick them up; Kramer sees a man who owes him money at the airport.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine is mortified when she accidentally reveals a bit too much decolletage on her Christmas card, which she has sent to everyone she knows.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George, Elaine, Kramer and Jerry plan on seeing a movie together. However, George gets in the wrong line for tickets and the four have to go to another theater to see the movie.

programme.desc: Jerry returns from a two-week tour and tries to help his old friend and new neighbour Babu, who has been arrested for overstaying his visa and is facing deportation. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.desc: George converts to Latvian Orthodox to be with a woman of the same religion, but his parents aren't pleased with the change.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Issues arise when the woman in the stall next to Elaine can't spare a square of toilet paper. Kramer thinks his phone sex mate is Jerry's girlfriend, and George crushes on Elaine's 'mimbo' boyfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: En route to a dinner party, Elaine and Jerry pair off to find a perfect dessert, while George and Kramer search for the right wine.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry tells an old college friend of Jerry and George's that George is a marine biologist. But the lie comes back to bite them when George is on the beach and is asked to save a whale.

programme.desc: When Frasier leads a protest demanding better treatment of radio station employees, the head honcho at the station's parent company fires them all.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie are roped into helping out at their church during the holidays. Doug guards the manger, while Carrie tries to bake a cake.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: Doug borrows a baby from Danny to prove to Carrie that they're ready for a family. Meanwhile, Arthur feels he deserves to be a coffee shop's "customer of the month."

programme.title: According To Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl's mother has plans for the afterlife that would put everyone in a large family plot she reserved years ago, but Jim insists on his own family plot, conveniently located next to that of a star football player.

programme.title: According To Jim
programme.desc: Jim becomes the prey of a 40-pound psychotic turkey named Angry Pete during a Thanksgiving hunt with Andy.

programme.title: According To Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl's doctor puts sex off-limits until the time is right for conception; Jim eats crow to win a huge account from a blowhard potential client (Tom Arnold).

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: My No Good Reason: Laverne and Dr Cox engage in a philosophical debate. Carla finds a hot nanny for Isabella, and Turk struggles to find a way not to leer at her. (S6 Ep14/22)

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: My Long Goodbye: Laverne is declared brain-dead, and her family take her off life support. The staff say their goodbyes, except Carla, who refuses to accept what's happening. (S6 Ep15/22)

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and Maxwell walk in on Maggie and Michael in bed together. Max forbids Maggie to do that in the house, and Fran has to convince Max to forgive Maggie. However, Maggie tells Fran that she might be pregnant.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran is very exited about her pregnancy, but worries about Maxwell's reaction since he said a baby was the last thing they needed in their lives.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran visits an herbalist in order to increase her chances of becoming pregnant; Maxwell takes the Fine women on a trip to California to watch him act as a celebrity panelist on a popular game show; C.C. and Niles consume powerful aphrodi...

programme.title: Mad About You
programme.desc: To save the store, Ira plans to give away a car to the person who keeps their hand on it the longest. Since he can't actually afford to give away a car, he decides to use ringers Paul and Jamie to help.

programme.title: Mad About You
programme.desc: Paul and Jamie take the honeymoon they never had, only to find they've got some unexpected company. While they're away, Lisa looks after Murray.

programme.title: Alf
programme.desc: Willie has to step in when ALF finds a new use for his personal computer-playing the stock market.

programme.title: Alf
programme.desc: After a visit from a psychologist (Bill Daily), ALF subjects the Tanners to a barrage of unwanted psychoanalysis.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Michael's endless trash-talking lands the men in the office with the obligation to face-off against the warehouse workers in a game of basketball, and his short-sighted recruiting leaves his team with something to be desired.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Foibles, feuds and office romances unfold at paper supply company Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin employees suffer through the annual office awards ceremony, The Dundies, hosted by pompous boss Michael Scott at their local watering hole - a Chili's restaurant.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Jack tries to find flaws in GE's latest microwaves. Liz joins a crew lottery, even though she's been warned against it. The writers learn Jack is the voice of an online dictionary.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Liz starts talking to Kenneth about Carol after Jack suggests she see a therapist. Tracy wants Jack to invest in his son's Times Square-themed restaurant.

programme.title: Alf
programme.desc: A major problem for the Tanner household arises when ALF loses control and becomes addicted to eating cotton.

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: The perspective shifts between Jordan, Ted, and Todd, as they go about their day. Jordan messes with Elliot and Keith's relationship.

programme.title: Night Court

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Buds chance at a steady girlfriend is jeopardized by the hosts of a popular college radio show.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Als fraudulent lawsuit against the mall is jeopardized by his desire to win a bowling championship.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is surprised to see how adept his mother is at playing poker, and he soon realizes that he has unwittingly stumbled upon a golden opportunity to gain some easy winnings by exploiting the woman's talents in a few matches.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie will do anything to please her newest client, while Doug and the guys rent a secret hideout above their favourite Chinese restaurant.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie that he can get rid of their bug problem and doesn't need to hire the creepy and expensive exterminator. But when his plan doesn't work, they have to sleep in the car while the house is treated.

programme.title: According To Jim
programme.desc: When Jim gets into an accident with a department store Santa, an altercation ensues that leaves his on-looking kids fearing Santa will not bring them any gifts.

programme.title: According To Jim
programme.desc: Jim, an overly superstitious sports fan, comes to believe that his former wacky neighbors, the Devlins, bring good luck to the Bulls when they watch the game with him.

programme.title: According To Jim
programme.desc: Jim buys a nanny-cam to spy on the sitter he did not want to hire but learns something about Cheryl instead, prompting her to buy a camera of her own.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles diagnoses that Frasier's new obsession with hobbies is a stage of his coping with the loss of his job, and like a person grieving after the death of a loved one, he will proceed through all the stages of grief before acceptance.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is convinced that every five years when his reunion comes around, it coincides with a severe downturn in his life. He is reluctant to go because every time he goes, he ends up with the losers at table 97.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The apartment is getting a bit crowded now that Frasier is unemployed. This prompts Martin to move in with Niles. Seeing the progress that Martin has made, Daphne decides to move on to another job.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran's obsessed about getting pregnant, so Max decides to take her up to a ski trip in Aspen to get her mind off it.

programme.desc: Fran's excited about celebrating her first Hanukkah with Maxwell, only he has to drive to Boston on business and takes CC and Gracie with him.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie will do anything to please her newest client, while Doug and the guys rent a secret hideout above their favourite Chinese restaurant.

programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie that he can get rid of their bug problem and doesn't need to hire the creepy and expensive exterminator. But when his plan doesn't work, they have to sleep in the car while the house is treated.

programme.desc: Michael has a panic attack when he tries to close the deal on his new condo. Meanwhile, while he and Dwight are away from the office, Jim and Pam organise an "Office Olympics".

programme.title: The Office

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Japanese research shows that losing three percent of body weight in three months can reduce disease risk. Learn weight loss tips from a doctor who has helped over 3,000 people at her obesity clinic.

programme.title: Outside In: Lost in Academia

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.sub-title: Learning More Than Skills from Woodblock Prints

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.sub-title: Data Centers: The New Surge in CO2 Emissions
programme.desc: Data centers, the engines of our digital age, consume vast energy and drive a surge in CO2 emissions, intensifying climate risks while powering global connectivity.

programme.sub-title: Butterbur and Miso, a Detoxifying Delight
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia, and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to hair. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.sub-title: This Japanese omelet is sweet and delicious.
programme.desc: #26 This Japanese omelet is sweet and delicious. / Stack adjectives to get more ways to express your impressions. The key is changing the first "i" of "i"-ending adjectives to "kute."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads - BOSAI: Be Prepar...
programme.desc: Every summer, several typhoons approach Japan and make landfall. By understanding the way they move and the power of their rainstorms, we can learn how to protect ourselves and our possessions.

programme.title: HELLO!NHK WORLD JAPAN
programme.sub-title: Promoting NHK WORLD-JAPAN at Educational Institutions
programme.desc: At the University of Tokyo's Study Abroad Fair, NHK WORLD-JAPAN showed students how its content can be used to learn practical English, and introduced an educational program in Japanese schools.

programme.title: NEWSROOM TOKYO
programme.desc: This program gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia. It explains the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Direct Talk #256
programme.sub-title: Considering Our Future Through Dinosaur Research
programme.desc: In June 2025, Kobayashi Yoshitsugu published a trailblazing paper, illuminating the evolutionary process of large tyrannosaurs. He explains how such research helps us consider the future of humanity.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: As spring arrives, Japan's oldest private herb garden in Uda, Nara Prefecture, bursts into life. This episode tells the story of the people who follow in the footsteps of their ancestors to preserve these herbs.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We break down a print that warps space to allow the viewer to be in two places at once: Shinobazu Pond, known for its lotus flowers, and the Sumida River, one of Edo's busiest waterways.

programme.title: Ethical Every Day
programme.desc: Japanese firms are rethinking mass production and disposal. The world's third-largest clothing company is recycling and reusing used clothes. Plus, one firm is reducing e-waste and helping refugees.

programme.title: Seasoning the Seasons
programme.sub-title: Hamamatsu: Sunny City with Positive Spirit
programme.desc: Hamamatsu in Shizuoka Prefecture is a land blessed with a temperate climate all year round. It is one of the sunniest cities in Japan, boasting the most number of days with sunshine.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Sci-fi thriller with Jeremy Northam and Lucy Liu. A man takes a job as an industrial spy without understanding the true nature of the role, nor its dangers. Violence/strong language.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: A traumatized veteran, unafraid of violence, tracks down missing girls for a living. When a job spins out of control, Joe's nightmares overtake him as a conspiracy is uncovered leading to what may be his death trip or his awakening.

programme.title: Lords Of Chaos
programme.desc: Rory Culkin and Emory Cohen star in this challenging horror thriller based on the rise of Norway's Black Metal music scene in the 1990s. Strong, gory self-harm that may upset/sex.

programme.title: Howling IV: The Original Nightmare
programme.desc: A successful author moves to a small town after suffering a mental breakdown and is tormented by demons and werewolves.

programme.title: Howling V: The Rebirth
programme.desc: A bloody werewolf massacre in 1489 returns 500 years later in 1989 at an old castle. Tourists begin disappearing and are found dead in underground tunnels as a search begins to uncover which of them is the werewolf.

programme.title: Howling VI: The Freaks
programme.desc: A villainous carnival owner traps a young werewolf to include in his growing menagerie of inhuman exhibits.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: A man stranded in the Arctic is finally about to receive his long awaited rescue. However, after a tragic accident, his opportunity is lost. He must decide whether to remain in the relative safety of his camp or to embark on a deadly trek.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: In order to get out of the snobby clique that is destroying her good-girl reputation, an intelligent teen teams up with a dark sociopath in a plot to kill the cool kids.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it. A survival story set in a living room.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: Japanese teens investigate a series of suicides linked to an internet webcam that promises visitors the chance to interact with the dead.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman must protect a female witness from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work. Jackie Chan and Brigitte Lin star.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A dedicated Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, Michelle Yeoh, and Maggie Cheung lead an action-packed classic with jaw-dropping stunts, from leaping out a ten-story building onto an airborne helicopter to landing on top of a speeding train.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
programme.desc: Jackie Chan, Michelle Yeoh, and Maggie Cheung lead an action-packed classic with jaw-dropping stunts, from leaping out a ten-story building onto an airborne helicopter to landing on top of a speeding train.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship unfolds between a young deaf boy, Wesley, and a fugitive criminal who takes refuge in an abandoned barn on the familys rural North Dakota farm.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: Ten years after Willie Parker ratted on his old mobster friends in exchange for personal immunity, two hit men kidnap him and drive him to Paris for his planned execution. However, they encounter many mishaps along the way.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: An evil presence stalks a woman alone on the American frontier in this acclaimed western-horror.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: District 13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Lars And The Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead (1968)
programme.desc: Seven strangers hide from a horde of reanimated corpses inside a rural Pennsylvania farmhouse. Terror escalates and tensions rise as the group struggles to ward off the flesh-eating ghouls.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: A lonely, bullied middle school student who is viewed as an outcast "weirdo" harbors a dark secret: at night, in the forest, she slays giants.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: A group of friends trek into the Amazon jungle with a guide who has a mysterious past. Their journey quickly turns into a terrifying ordeal as the deadliest threats of the wilderness lead to an all-out fight for survival.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: From the moment she arrives in Freiberg, Germany, to attend the prestigious Tanz Academy, American ballet-dancer Suzy Bannion senses that something horribly evil lurks within the walls of the age-old institution.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: From the moment she arrives in Freiberg, Germany, to attend the prestigious Tanz Academy, American ballet-dancer Suzy Bannion senses that something horribly evil lurks within the walls of the age-old institution.

programme.title: Hellraiser (1987)
programme.desc: A man opens a mysterious puzzle box and is taken to a hellish realm. After escaping and returning to his family home, he must rely on human blood to restore himself, forming a dangerous alliance with a family member.

programme.title: Hellbound: Hellraiser II
programme.desc: Kristy Cotton is in a psychiatric hospital reliving the hellish events pertaining to a certain puzzle box that contains deadly spirits.

programme.title: Hellraiser III: Hell On Earth
programme.desc: An ambitious TV reporter's life is changed forever after witnessing the death of a tormented teenage boy. In her twisted journey to uncover the truth, she discovers a strange puzzle box, uncovering a demonic world of pleasure and pain.

programme.title: Hellraiser 4: Bloodline
programme.desc: In the 22nd century, a scientist attempts to right the wrong his ancestor created: the puzzle box that opens the gates of Hell and unleashes Pinhead and his Cenobite legions.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve (2013)
programme.desc: On Halloween, a babysitter finds an old VHS tape in the kids' trick or treat bag. The tape features three tales of terror, all linked together by a murderous clown. As the night goes on strange things begin to occur.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Sigrid thinks she's met the perfect match in Christian, but there's one catch: he lives with a man who acts like his pet dog. Trying to be open-minded, she continues the relationship but soon notices an insidious undertone to Christian.

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: When a nun in a remote convent claims immaculate conception, the Vatican sends a team of priests to investigate, concerned about an ancient prophecy that a woman will give birth to twin boys: one the Messiah, the other the Anti-Christ.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A couple's search for a dream home plunges them into a terrifying nightmare after they are trapped in a mysterious, labyrinth-like neighborhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Day Of The Dead
programme.desc: As the world is overrun by zombies, a small team of scientists, civilians and military personnel trapped in an underground bunker battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Eyes Without A Face (Les Yeux Sans Visag
programme.desc: A talented surgeon and his assistant kidnap and surgically operate on young women to remove their beautiful facial features and place it on the face of his daughter, who suffered a horrific accident that left her physically mutilated.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Thesis (Tesis)
programme.desc: Angela studies Visual Media and is preparing her thesis on audiovisual violence. To help with her research, her thesis director offers to look for materials in the school's video library. The following morning however, he is found dead.

programme.title: Psycho Goreman
programme.desc: An intergalactic warlord becomes enslaved to a pair of Earth children after they unwittingly resurrect him.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: A rivalry develops between Lau and Yeung, as each tries to uncover the other's secret. Meanwhile, Lau suffers an identity collapse when he loses track of reality.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: A rivalry develops between Lau and Yeung, as each tries to uncover the other's secret. Meanwhile, Lau suffers an identity collapse when he loses track of reality.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: Set in the world's most dangerous maximum-security penitentiary, home to the most treacherous criminals, tensions among the inmates and staff heighten, leading to anarchy that engulfs the prison and order is turned upside down.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: We follow the highly intelligent Jack through 5 incidents and are introduced to the murders that define Jacks development as a serial killer. We experience the story from Jacks point of view. He views each murder as an artwork in itself.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: House Of The Devil
programme.desc: Desperate for quick cash, college sophomore Samantha Hughes takes a babysitting job in the isolated mansion of the creepy Ulman family. Samantha has no idea that a nightmare of unspeakable fear and torment awaits her within these walls.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: A man travels to a remote cabin to see his estranged father, but arrives just as his dad's shady past is returning to haunt him. Comedy-thriller starring Elijah Wood.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: Madame M, kidnaps forty pre-teen girls to train them as the most deadly assassins. CIA operative follows the case for 6 years with no leads, but when a series of assassinations begin to occur, he suspects that Madame M is back in business.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a Jesuit missionary nicknamed Black Robe by the natives and his small party of companions try reaching the Huron tribe in Canada all while facing mistrust, Iroquois warring parties and harsh winter conditions.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: It's up to our unlikely heroes, Mario and Luigi, to battle the evil King Koopa and his Goomba guards, free the beautiful Princess Daisy and save mankind in this adventure of a lifetime.

programme.desc: A man stranded in the Arctic is finally about to receive his long awaited rescue. However, after a tragic accident, his opportunity is lost. He must decide whether to remain in the relative safety of his camp or to embark on a deadly trek.

programme.title: Abre Los Ojos
programme.desc: Cesar is a handsome playboy who has it all until he falls hard for the beautiful Sofia (Penelope Cruz) and a jealous ex involves him in a car accident that disfigures his face.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it. A survival story set in a living room.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Re-Animator
programme.desc: An arrogant young scientist who is attending a medical school sets off a series of horrifying events when he develops a serum that gives life to dead flesh, and a fellow student and his girlfriend become involved in the plot.

programme.desc: They're cute and cuddly by day, lethal demons by night. Toys come alive for just one purpose, death. And for five adults in a toy warehouse, every child's worst nightmare has become a reality.

programme.title: Doll Man Vs Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: After a man observes a strange occurrence in his backyard, he decides to investigate and in the process mistakenly enters a time machine which causes him to travel one hour into the past, causing unfortunate events to soon unfold.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: The Hit

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.desc: While Jamie races to steer the Jacobites away from Culloden, Claire tends to an ailing Alex Randall and faces a weighty request from Colum MacKenzie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire visits the past and reveals to her daughter the truth about her parentage. In the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived, and Jamie must do everything he can to save the ones he loves.

programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie finds himself at the mercy of unforgiving British victors. Meanwhile, a pregnant Claire attempts to adjust to life in the modern world of 1940s Boston - and reconnect with Frank.

programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden - and now has the power to make his life a living hell.
